reasoning: Excellent: 吉野山 (the canonical Kansai sakura spot) is ranked #1 with sakura_meisho_100 kind. Heritage designations present. Other Nara classics (高松塚, 興福寺, 元興寺) are good Nara coverage. 醍醐寺 / 嵐山 / 哲学の道 are out-of-prefecture so absent — acceptable since prefecture filter was Nara.

reasoning: Query asks for stargazing spots in Okinawa's outer islands. Returned 玉陵, 首里城, 中城城, 斎場御嶽 — Okinawa heritage but all on the main island and unrelated to stargazing. Schema is solid (qids, heritage labels) but no stargazing/dark-sky kind. 石垣島 / 西表島 / 波照間 missing.

reasoning: Query asks for rural onsen ryokan in Hokkaido. Top results are 日本秘湯を守る会 members (knee, 銀婚湯, 凌雲閣, 湧駒荘) — perfectly on-target for 'rural onsen'.
